content: If you're still there then i can
I have a question as a player who hasn't touched traphase at all
I read a little on the descriptions on the characters mostly and played around with it but
Is a Gmurphy and Helot team ok? It sometimes feels a little awkward to use and I tend to just hold the charges until I have exalt for both
Not sure who would be good for the remaining two so I just took like, tulu and aigis
It is, but arachne might be better
With GMurphy the damages hit + stacks sacrifice, but at the same time it regen every enemies alienus
But at least it bypass barrier
Meanwhile arachne make your damages not giving them any alienus
And the one who got buffed by arachne is kinda invincible during the time
Even though they will receive the dmg 1 turn after in DoT form
But that part doesn't matter if Helot dmg is high enough to kill everyone
So technically Helot is invincible during that turn, even if you kill everybody, helot will still be alive
Meanwhile GMurphy can be bricked if everyone in your team is killed
But arachne's debuff DoT can't be stacked on barrier hit
These are the pros and cons
<:takenotes:1357186646294138890> everyone ive come across plays barrier so far
There are some strat to play against it, mainly weave or 2 cost from corpo
Which both of them are multi hit, although it's random
And depending on who have barrier you can use helot's skill to target highest hp
One of the best way to abuse it is through winkle's vuln exalt
You intentionally make someone low because they are highest hp
Then you nuke with helot 2 cost, and when they become low and other have more hp
You arachne exalt helot and such
So the enemy doesn't receive anymore dmg to make helot skill spread out
Yeah since the dmg becomes delayed dmg
That's an interesting interaction, I'll try that
You basically play with who have the current highest hp
The best play is also to vulnerable the 2 other weakest unit they have
Front will mostly eat all the strike dmg so they will be low anyway
Oh so basically the back units
The 2 lowest will receive vuln debuff so they will eat so much dmg from exalt
And helot can just skill the highest hp
With arachne's effect it just keep attacking highest hp
Yeah, i think i have some replay i can show you
omg i would appreciate it if you showed if you have the time
would like to see how that works
